footer.taglineSuffix: one platform for fees, grades, and parent communication in DRC schools.

home.heroTitleLine1: Stop running your school on notebooks and WhatsApp
home.heroTitleLine2: Every week you wait, fees leak, grades scatter, and parents find out late.
home.heroSubtitle: Fees leak. Grades scatter. Parents find out late.
home.heroSubtitleBody: One afternoon to go live—before another term pays for the chaos.
home.heroSubtitleMobilePayoff: One afternoon beats another term of leaks
home.heroSubtitleExtra: No setup fees. Real support on WhatsApp when you need it.
home.trustLocalDesc: Programme National report cards, local fees, French-first—not foreign software you have to reshape
home.trustSimpleDesc: Not another term lost to notebooks and WhatsApp while you keep planning the switch
home.trustSupportDesc: Fee season, report cards, parent questions—WhatsApp and email, answered by real people
home.trustAffordableDesc: No setup fees or lock-in—often less than one fee payment lost to delays each term
home.audienceIntro: One platform for everyone who runs the school—directors, teachers, and parents.
home.connectivitySubtitle: Take attendance and check fees even when the connection drops. Install ShuleOS on any phone—it works offline and syncs when you're back online.
home.connectivityFeature1: Works on any smartphone—no special hardware needed
home.connectivityFeature2: Add to your home screen—open it like an app in one tap
home.connectivityFeature3: Attendance and key pages keep working offline
home.pwaInstallImageAlt: Teacher installing ShuleOS on a smartphone
home.pwaInstallNowHint: Before the next outage takes attendance offline
home.pwaInstallBrowserHint: Open this page on your phone — Safari on iPhone, Chrome on Android
home.pwaInstallIosHint: Safari can’t auto-install — tap for the 3 steps
home.pwaInstallIosSteps: Use Share, then Add to Home Screen. Takes about 10 seconds.
home.pwaInstallIosStep1: Tap Share at the bottom of Safari
home.pwaInstallIosStep2: Scroll down and tap Add to Home Screen
home.pwaInstallIosStep3: Tap Add — open ShuleOS like any other app
home.pwaInstalledHint: Open it from your home screen anytime
home.rolesSectionTitle: Tools for every role in your school
home.rolesSectionSubtitle: Directors see the full picture. Teachers spend less time on paperwork. Parents check fees and grades from their phone.
home.teacherActiveUserPresence: Attendance and grades captured in minutes
home.parentActiveUserPresence: Fees and grades visible without office queues
home.modulesSectionSubtitle: Admissions, fees, grades, messaging, analytics, and your public website—all connected in one platform.
home.finalCtaTitleLine1: Ready to leave the notebooks behind?
home.finalCtaTitleLine2: One afternoon beats another term of leaks.
home.finalCtaSubtitle: Schools across the DRC use {productName} for fees, report cards, and parent communication—with no setup fees and support when you need it.
home.finalCtaHighlight1: No setup fees or long-term contracts
home.finalCtaHighlight3: WhatsApp support from a real team
home.adminTitle: Directors: see your whole school at a glance
home.adminDescription: Stop checking notebooks for fee balances and separate files for grades. One dashboard shows finances, attendance, performance, and staff—updated as things happen.
home.adminFeature1: Students, classes, admissions, and staff in one place
home.adminFeature2: Live fee balances—not surprises at the end of term
home.adminFeature3: Branded school website with online admissions
home.teacherDescription: Take attendance once, enter grades once, and message parents from one dashboard—instead of rewriting lists every evening.
home.teacherFeature1: Daily attendance without rewriting paper lists
home.teacherFeature2: Gradebooks, exams, and Programme National report cards
home.teacherFeature3: Message parents directly—no more "come to the office"
home.parentTitle: Parents: fees and grades on your phone
home.parentDescription: Check what your child owes, see grades and timetables, and pay school fees via mobile money—without queuing at the office.
home.parentFeature1: Grades, attendance, and timetables in one app
home.parentFeature2: Pay the exact balance via mobile money
home.parentFeature3: Submit homework and message teachers from your phone

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Every leak has a fix
features.heroSubtitle: Scattered records, manual fee chasing, and report cards that shut down the office for a week—{productName} replaces the hidden costs with one integrated platform built for DRC schools.
features.ctaTitle: You already know the cost. See the fix.
features.ctaSubtitle: Get access for your school and walk through every module in a live environment—before the next term starts.

contact.title: Contact us

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Guides to stop the leaks—module by module.
docs.gettingStartedDesc: Register your school, complete onboarding, and invite your team before the next intake.
docs.academicModuleDesc: Stop report card season from shutting down the office—classes, timetables, attendance, and grades in one place.
docs.financeModuleDesc: Stop chasing the same balances every month—invoices, mobile money, and reminders on WhatsApp.
docs.parentPortalDesc: Stop the office queue—parents see fees, grades, and timetables on their phone.
docs.securityModuleDesc: Your school's data deserves better than notebooks and shared spreadsheets.

getAccess.heroBadge: Fix it before the next term
getAccess.heroTitle: Your school already runs a system.
getAccess.heroTitleHighlight: It's just scattered, manual, and expensive.
getAccess.heroSubtitle: Every week off-platform: lost fees, duplicate records, angry parents, and report cards that take days. {productName} costs less than keeping the leaks open.
getAccess.mobilePreviewAlt: {productName} mobile app preview — academics, mobile money payments, and parent communication
getAccess.journeySubtitle: Four steps out of spreadsheet chaos—most schools finish in one afternoon.
getAccess.step1Title: Stop adding another year to the stack
getAccess.step1Desc: Register your school in 60 seconds—name, admin email, or continue with Google.
getAccess.step2Title: Don't wait another intake for a public site
getAccess.step2Desc: A guided wizard sets your domain, colors, and admissions-ready website template.
getAccess.step3Title: Teachers keep doing double entry until they're in
getAccess.step3Desc: Invite teachers, bursars, and admins—each gets a role-specific dashboard from day one.
getAccess.step4Title: Parents keep calling the office until they have a portal
getAccess.step4Desc: Go live with your school portal and public website. Fees, grades, and messages—on their phone.
getAccess.includedSubtitle: One platform replaces the tools that fail you every term.
getAccess.included5: School public website with online admissions
